scripts.test: npm run build && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/rendered-html.test.mjs tests/ux-contract.test.mjs tests/game-engine.test.ts tests/standard-ruleset-data.test.ts tests/agent-protocol.test.ts tests/agent-cli.test.ts tests/card-catalog.test.ts && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:characters:mutations && npm run test:store
scripts.test:characters:audit: esbuild tests/character-system-audit.test.ts tests/character-locked-lord-edge.test.ts tests/character-trigger-edge.test.ts tests/character-exhaustive-edge.test.ts tests/character-deep-interactions.test.ts tests/character-combinatorial-matrix.test.ts tests/equipment-character-interactions.test.ts tests/action-presentation.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=/tmp/mouju-character-audit --out-extension:.js=.mjs --log-level=warning && node --test /tmp/mouju-character-audit/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:store: esbuild tests/store-agent-control.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=/tmp/mouju-store-agent-control.test.mjs --log-level=warning && node --test /tmp/mouju-store-agent-control.test.mjs && esbuild tests/four-agent-match.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=/tmp/mouju-four-agent-match.test.mjs --log-level=warning && node --test /tmp/mouju-four-agent-match.test.mjs
